purpose: Extend ThemeManifestSchema (app/src/themes/schema.ts) with an optional, additive treatments.dynamic map so a manifest can declare a load-time-generated visual element (banner first) alongside its required static fallback, and join a build-time validation gate that fails loud on an unknown generator name or an out-of-bounds style token.

public_api.name: ThemeManifestSchema
public_api.signature: z.ZodObject<...> (extended: treatments.dynamic is now an additional optional field on the existing treatments object)
public_api.description: Existing exported schema, unchanged in shape except for the new optional treatments.dynamic key. Every other field (including the required treatments.banner) is untouched.

public_api.name: ThemeManifest
public_api.description: Existing exported inferred type; now structurally includes an optional treatments.dynamic?: { banner?: DynamicElement, background?: DynamicElement }. Downstream modules (S2's dynamicVisuals.ts, S3's useDynamicBanner.ts) consume the DynamicElement/StyleToken shape via TypeScript indexing off this type (e.g. NonNullable<ThemeManifest['treatments']['dynamic']>['banner']), matching the existing convention that nested schema shapes (e.g. FontLoadSchema) are not separately exported from schema.ts.

public_api.name: validateManifest
public_api.description: Existing exported function, unchanged signature and behavior — throws (ZodError) on any missing/mistyped/extra field, now including violations nested under treatments.dynamic.

private_files: app/src/themes/schema.ts (internal, unexported additions: DynamicGeneratorNameSchema, StyleTokenSchema, DynamicElementSchema, DynamicTreatmentsSchema — reached in tests via ThemeManifestSchema.shape.treatments.shape.dynamic.* accessors, mirroring the existing FontLoadSchema/ElevationNameSchema convention of not exporting nested schema objects)
owned_data: the DynamicElement / StyleToken shape and its validation bounds (anchorHue 0-359, saturation 20-100, lightness 20-75, scheme enum, generator enum) — validation-only, never present at runtime in the client bundle
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts (does not exist yet - S2; schema.ts must not import it, per architecture.md Boundary Rule 3's inline-enum convention)
